title: 我以前是/有
prompt_en: Practice using was/were/had to describe past states and possessions.
prompt_zh: 练习用was/were/had描述过去的状态和拥有。
description: 掌握was/were的肯定否定疑问和have→had过去式。
knowledge_points: 过去时 was were had 状态 过去
teaching_markdown:
## was / were 过去状态
- I was a student last year. (我去年是学生)
- He was very shy before. (他以前很害羞)
- They were at home yesterday. (他们昨天在家)

## had 过去拥有
- I had a dog when I was a child. (我小时候有只狗)
- She had long hair last year. (她去年是长发)

## 过去描述
- It was a nice day yesterday. (昨天天气很好)
- I was happy with the result. (我对结果很满意)

title: 昨天在哪里
prompt_en: Practice asking and answering about past locations and feelings.
prompt_zh: 练习询问和回答过去的位置和感受。
description: 掌握Where were you? / Were you...? 过去疑问句。
knowledge_points: 过去 位置 感受 疑问 回答
teaching_markdown:
## Where were you? 问过去的所在
- Where were you last night? — I was at home.
- Were you at home last night? — Yes, I was.

## 位置表达
- I was at the office all day. (我一整天都在办公室)
- Was she at the party? — No, she wasn't.

## 过去评价
- How was your weekend? — It was great!
- The movie was really boring.
- Was it cold yesterday?

title: 过去的感受
prompt_en: Practice describing past feelings and emotions.
prompt_zh: 练习描述过去的感受和情绪。
description: 掌握用was/were+形容词表达过去感受。
knowledge_points: 过去 感受 情绪 形容词
teaching_markdown:
## 过去感受描述
- I was happy with the result. (我对结果很满意)
- I was tired after work. (下班后我很累)
- She was excited about the trip. (她对旅行很兴奋)

## 询问感受
- How was your weekend? — It was great!
- Was it fun? — Yes, it was fun.
- Were you nervous? — A little bit.

title: 过去的外表
prompt_en: Practice describing past appearance and physical traits.
prompt_zh: 练习描述过去的外表和特征。
description: 掌握用was/were/had描述过去的外表。
knowledge_points: 过去 外表 特征 描述
teaching_markdown:
## 过去外表描述
- He was very shy before. (他以前很害羞)
- She had long hair last year. (她去年是长发)
- I had glasses when I was a child. (我小时候戴眼镜)

## 过去vs现在
- He used to be short, but now he is tall.
- She had short hair, but now she has long hair.

title: 过去的天气和日子
prompt_en: Practice describing past weather and days.
prompt_zh: 练习描述过去的天气和日子。
description: 掌握用It was...描述过去天气。
knowledge_points: 过去 天气 日子 描述
teaching_markdown:
## 过去天气
- It was a nice day yesterday. (昨天天气很好)
- Was it cold yesterday? (昨天冷吗？)
- It was rainy all day. (下了一整天雨)

## 过去评价
- The movie was really boring. (那部电影真的很无聊)
- The party was fun! (派对很好玩！)
- The food was delicious. (食物很美味)
ink_script_key: practice_foundation-social-express_过去的状态_过去的天气和日子

title: 昨天做了什么
prompt_en: Practice describing past actions with regular -ed verbs.
prompt_zh: 练习用规则动词过去式描述过去的动作。
description: 掌握规则动词加ed的读音和拼写。
knowledge_points: 过去时 ed 发音 规则动词
teaching_markdown:
## 规则动词过去式 (-ed)
- I watched a movie last night. (我昨晚看了一部电影)
- I played basketball with my friends. (我和朋友打了篮球)
- I studied for two hours. (我学习了两个小时)
- I cooked dinner for my family. (我给家人做了晚饭)

## 日常生活动作
- I got up at 8 yesterday. (我昨天8点起床)
- I went to the supermarket. (我去了超市)
- I ate noodles for lunch. (我午饭吃了面条)

title: 不规则动词
prompt_en: Practice 30 common irregular past tense verbs.
prompt_zh: 练习30个核心不规则动词过去式。
description: 掌握went/ate/had/did/saw/said/got等不规则变化。
knowledge_points: 不规则动词 过去式 核心动词
teaching_markdown:
## 高频不规则动词
- I saw a friend at the mall. (我在商场看到一个朋友)
- She said hello to me. (她跟我打了招呼)
- I got a new phone last week. (我上周买了新手机)
- He made a big cake for the party. (他为派对做了大蛋糕)
- I did my homework after school. (我放学后做了作业)
- We had a great time at the beach. (我们在海滩玩得很开心)
- She took a lot of photos. (她拍了很多照片)
- He came home very late. (他很晚才回家)

title: 规则动词 -ed
prompt_en: Practice regular past tense verb endings and pronunciation.
prompt_zh: 练习规则动词过去式的三种发音。
description: 掌握-ed的三种发音：/t/ /d/ /ɪd/。
knowledge_points: 规则动词 ed 发音 t d id
teaching_markdown:
## 三种发音
- /t/: watched, cooked, helped, talked, finished
- /d/: played, studied, called, lived, cleaned
- /ɪd/: wanted, needed, started, visited, decided

## 拼写规则
- work→worked (直接+ed)
- study→studied (y→ied)
- stop→stopped (双写+ed)
- like→liked (直接+d)

title: 过去的时间表达
prompt_en: Practice past time expressions: yesterday/last/ago.
prompt_zh: 练习过去时间表达：yesterday/last/ago。
description: 掌握常见过去时间标志词。
knowledge_points: 过去 时间 表达 昨天 去年
teaching_markdown:
## 时间词
- yesterday (昨天)
- last night / last week / last month / last year
- two days ago / three months ago / a year ago
- in 2018 / in 2020 / when I was a child

## 例句
- I went to the park yesterday.
- I moved here in 2018.
- I started this job three months ago.
ink_script_key: practice_foundation-social-express_过去的动作_过去的时间表达

title: 过去频率
prompt_en: Practice expressing frequency in the past.
prompt_zh: 练习表达过去的频率。
description: 掌握always/usually/often等表示过去频率的副词。
knowledge_points: 过去 频率 副词 always usually
teaching_markdown:
## 过去频率
- I always watched TV after school. (我放学总看电视)
- I usually ate breakfast at 7. (我通常7点吃早餐)
- I often played with friends. (我经常和朋友玩)
- I sometimes went to the library. (我有时去图书馆)

## 句型
- I always ___ when I was a ___.

title: 上个周末/去年
prompt_en: Practice telling stories about last weekend and last year.
prompt_zh: 练习讲述上周末和去年的经历。
description: 掌握用过去时叙述完整经历的能力。
knowledge_points: 叙事 过去时 经历 时间表达
teaching_markdown:
## 用过去时叙述经历
- Last weekend I visited my grandparents. (上周末我看望了祖父母)
- Last year I traveled to Japan. (去年我去了日本旅行)

## 时间表达
- Last weekend / Last year / Two years ago
- I lived in Shanghai two years ago.
- We moved to this city in 2018.
- I met my best friend in college.
- She started learning English when she was 10.

title: ago 表达
prompt_en: Practice using ago to express how long ago something happened.
prompt_zh: 练习用ago表达多久以前发生的事。
description: 掌握ago用于过去时间表达。
knowledge_points: ago 多久以前 过去 时间
teaching_markdown:
## ago 用法
- I lived in Shanghai two years ago.
- I started this job three months ago.
- I graduated one year ago.

## 结构
- 时间段 + ago
- two days / three weeks / a month / a year / a long time + ago

title: 某年某事
prompt_en: Practice describing events in specific years or times.
prompt_zh: 练习描述某年某事。
description: 掌握in+年份和when从句表达过去。
knowledge_points: 过去 年份 事件 时间
teaching_markdown:
## 某年某事
- We moved to this city in 2018. (我们2018年搬到了这个城市)
- I met my best friend in college. (我在大学认识了好朋友)
- She started learning English when she was 10.

## when从句
- when I was a child / when I was young / when I was in school

title: 否定句 didn't
prompt_en: Practice past tense negative sentences with didn't.
prompt_zh: 练习过去时否定句。
description: 掌握didn't+动词原形结构。
knowledge_points: 否定 didn't 过去时 原形
teaching_markdown:
## 否定句
- I didn't go to school yesterday. (我昨天没去上学)
- She didn't like the movie. (她不喜欢那部电影)

## 关键规则
- didn't + 动词原形 (never 过去式)
- ❌ I didn't went. → ✅ I didn't go.

title: 疑问句 Did
prompt_en: Practice past tense questions with Did.
prompt_zh: 练习过去时疑问句。
description: 掌握Did开头的一般疑问句和Wh-疑问句。
knowledge_points: 疑问 Did 过去时 提问
teaching_markdown:
## Did 一般疑问句
- Did you have a good weekend? — Yes, I did!
- Did she call you yesterday? — No, she didn't.

## Wh-疑问句
- When did you arrive? — I arrived at 3 pm.
- Where did you go last night? — I went to a concert.
- What did you do yesterday? — I stayed home.

title: 去过/做过
prompt_en: Practice using have been and have done for experiences.
prompt_zh: 练习用完成时表达去过/做过。
description: 掌握have been to和have done的结构。
knowledge_points: 完成时 经历 去过 做过
teaching_markdown:
## 去过某地
- I have been to Beijing. (我去过北京)
- Have you ever been to Shanghai? — Yes, I have.

## 做过某事
- I have never tried hot pot. (我从来没试过火锅)
- She has seen that movie three times. (那部电影她看过三次了)
- Have you finished your homework? — Yes, I have.

title: 刚刚/还没
prompt_en: Practice using just/already/yet with present perfect.
prompt_zh: 练习用just/already/yet与完成时搭配。
description: 掌握just/already/yet的用法区别。
knowledge_points: 完成时 刚刚 已经 还没 yet already
teaching_markdown:
## 刚刚 (just)
- I have just arrived at the station. (我刚到车站)
- I have lost my keys! (我钥匙丢了！)

## 已经 (already)
- She has already left the office. (她已经离开办公室了)

## 还没 (yet)
- I haven't eaten lunch yet. (我还没吃午饭)
- Have you eaten yet? — No, not yet.

title: 持续多久
prompt_en: Practice using for and since with present perfect.
prompt_zh: 练习用for和since表达持续多久。
description: 掌握for+时间段和since+时间点的用法。
knowledge_points: 完成时 for since 持续多久
teaching_markdown:
## for + 时间段
- I have lived here for five years. (我在这里住了五年了)

## since + 时间点
- She has worked here since 2020. (她2020年以来一直在这里工作)

## 问多久
- How long have you been here? — For about an hour.
- How long have you worked here? — Since last year.

title: ever/never
prompt_en: Practice using ever and never with present perfect.
prompt_zh: 练习用ever和never与完成时搭配。
description: 掌握ever（曾）和never（从未）在完成时中的用法。
knowledge_points: 完成时 曾经 从未 ever never
teaching_markdown:
## ever (曾)
- Have you ever been to Shanghai? — Yes, I have.
- This is the best movie I have ever seen!

## never (从未)
- I have never tried hot pot.
- She has never been abroad.

## 对比
- I have been to Japan. I went there last year. (完成时vs过去时)

title: 完成时混合表达
prompt_en: Practice mixed present perfect expressions in context.
prompt_zh: 练习完成时混合表达。
description: 掌握完成时多种用法混合表达。
knowledge_points: 完成时 混合 表达 综合
teaching_markdown:
## 综合表达
- I have been to Japan. I went there last year.
- This is the best movie I have ever seen!
- I have lived here for five years.
- She has already left.
- Have you finished yet?

## 对比
- 过去时：I went last year. (强调时间)
- 完成时：I have been. (强调经历)
ink_script_key: practice_foundation-social-express_完成时入门_完成时混合表达

title: 回忆过去
prompt_en: Practice recalling past memories and experiences.
prompt_zh: 练习回忆过去的经历和时光。
description: 掌握回忆过去的表达方式。
knowledge_points: 回忆 过去 记忆 remember
teaching_markdown:
## 回忆过去
- I remember when I was a child, I played outside every day.
- Those were the good old days.

## 回忆短语
- I remember when / I recall / back in the day
- When I was young / when I was a kid / in the old days

title: 过去vs现在习惯
prompt_en: Practice comparing past and present habits using used to.
prompt_zh: 练习用used to对比过去和现在的习惯。
description: 掌握used to表达过去习惯的用法。
knowledge_points: used to 过去习惯 现在对比
teaching_markdown:
## used to 表达
- I used to play the piano, but now I don't.
- She used to have long hair, but now she has short hair.
- I didn't use to like vegetables, but now I love them.
- Did you use to live here? — Yes, I did.
ink_script_key: practice_foundation-social-express_过去与现在对比_过去vs现在习惯

title: 生活变化
prompt_en: Practice talking about life changes and personal growth.
prompt_zh: 练习谈论生活的变化和成长。
description: 掌握描述个人变化的表达。
knowledge_points: 生活 变化 成长 改变
teaching_markdown:
## 生活变化
- I have changed a lot since then. (从那时起我变了很多)
- Things have changed so much in the past ten years. (过去十年变化太大了)

## 变化表达
- I have grown / learned / improved / matured
- Everything is different now.
- Looking back, I realize how much I have grown.

title: 今昔对比
prompt_en: Practice comparing the past with the present.
prompt_zh: 练习对比今昔的变化。
description: 掌握今昔对比的表达方式。
knowledge_points: 今昔对比 过去 现在 变化
teaching_markdown:
## 今昔对比
- Life was simpler before. Now everything is so fast.
- When I was young, I stayed up late. Now I go to bed early.
- I always watched TV after school when I was a kid.

## 对比结构
- [过去] was/were/used to... [现在] now/these days...
- There used to be a park here, but now it's a shopping mall.

title: used to表达
prompt_en: Practice using used to for past habits and states.
prompt_zh: 练习used to的各种用法。
description: 全面掌握used to的肯定否定疑问形式。
knowledge_points: used to 过去习惯 肯定 否定 疑问
teaching_markdown:
## used to 肯定
- I used to play the piano.
- There used to be a park here.

## used to 否定
- I didn't use to like vegetables.
- She didn't use to be so outgoing.

## used to 疑问
- Did you use to live here? — Yes, I did.
- Did you use to play soccer?

## 辨析
- I used to think this was difficult, but now I know it's easy.
- Looking back, I realize how much I have grown.
